category_sources: Official ratarmount GitHub repository describes accessing large TAR, RAR, ZIP, GZ, BZ2, XZ, and ZSTD archives as a filesystem.
source_facts.description says ratarmount mounts and efficiently accesses archives as filesystems.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is mxmlnkn/ratarmount.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README contains usage and command-line options.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is the source-control project for ratarmount.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official README documents command-line options, metadata index cache, bind mounting, file joining, and FUSE control interface.
source_facts.description identifies archive mounting as filesystems.
